title: Why the world’s banks are so worried about Anthropic’s latest AI model
description: Anthropic’s latest model – Mythos – has spooked the world of finance. So it’s a good idea to keep your computer and banking apps updated.

title: Oracle HCM AI agents automate recruitment, onboarding and performance management in HR
description: Oracle's HCM AI agents automate resume screening, onboarding, and performance reviews-cutting time-to-hire by 40% at some firms. The tools handle routine tasks so HR staff can focus on strategy and decisions.
